prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.1 kg; Height 172.6 cm; BMI 21.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 187mg/dL; 6 months ago 209mg/dL; 3 months ago 196mg/dL; current 213mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.9kg; 9 months ago 67.2kg; 6 months ago 65.3kg; 3 months ago 65.8kg; current 64.1kg), Height (12 months ago 172.6cm; 9 months ago 172.6cm; 6 months ago 172.6cm; 3 months ago 172.6cm; current 172.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 153mg/g; 9 months ago 131mg/g; 6 months ago 192mg/g; 3 months ago 194mg/g; current 170mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 142mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.8g/dL; 3 months ago 10.1g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.95 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
